ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2004 Continued To Nov-15-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-20-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Robert Hayden, Esq. for Petitioner: Marc Lannertone, present as guardian ad litem for Christophe Lugowski, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise of $3,500.00 is approved.
Attorney's fees: $700.00
Medical expenses $1,092.82
Costs $187.60
A net balance of $1,519.58 to be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Frago Bank, 599 Buckingham Way, San Francisco, CA., until minor's reaches the age of 18.
Counsel to prepare Orders.

Aug. 20, 2004
Order approving compromise of claim and Deposit money into blocked acct. rec'd in court and signed by Comm. Kaplan.
